---
title: "Analysis of high resolution aerial data"
id: module-hr-analysis
order: 140
summary: "High-resolution UAV orthoimages and point clouds require methods such as OBIA, machine learning, deep learning, and point-cloud classification."
module-goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - materialspat-analysis-000
  - materialspat-analysis-00
  - materialspat-analysis-0
  - materialspat-analysis-3
  - materialspat-analysis-2
  - materialspat-analysis-6
activities:
  - activity-analysis-0
  - activity-analysis-1
  - activity-analysis-4
  - activity-analysis-5
  - activity-analysis-5
  - activity-analysis-3
  - activity-analysis-6
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/module-microremotesensing.md"
title-block-banner: images/module-hr-analysis/icon1.png
title-block-banner-color: black
listing:
  - id: module-module-goals
    contents: "../module-goals/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-hr-analysis
      heading: "Goals"

  - id: module-materials
    contents: "../materials/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-hr-analysis
      heading: "Materials"

  - id: module-activities
    contents: "../activities/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-hr-analysis
      heading: "Activities"

  - id: module-assessments
    contents: "../assessments/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-hr-analysis
      heading: "Assessments"
---

This module bundles the processing workflow for creating high-quality outputs from aerial imagery.

::: {#module-module-goals}
:::

::: {#module-materials}
:::

::: {#module-activities}
:::

::: {#module-assessments}
:::
